COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the MBSF. We consider the beneficiary to be enrolled in an MMP 
managed care plan if the beneficiary had Medicare fee-for-service enrollment for the month and had 
one or more months when the MBSF monthly Part C plan type code (variable called 
PTC_PLAN_TYPE_CD_MM) = 48 (Medicare-Medicaid plan) or 49 (Medicare-Medicaid plan HMO point-
of-service [MMP HMOPOS]).
